_comment: Operator-declared safe tunables for the autoupgrade config-tune detector. Copy to loops/autoupgrade.tunables.json to enable autonomous config tuning. The loop will MECHANICALLY try each candidate value, run the benchmark + green + security, and (oracle) KEEP the value only if it is >=5% faster — else atomic git rollback. YOU bound the search space (which knobs, which safe values); the loop does the search+measure+keep. This is the ONLY autonomous repo-mutation path, by design: mechanical + bounded + reversible + benchmarked. Never put auth/RLS/secrets/payments/PII/schema knobs here.
